results.title: [PDF] Contesting the Platform: Worker Resistance in India's Food Delivery
results.content: An Online Peer Reviewed / Refereed Journal Volume 3 | Issue 5 | May 2025 ISSN: 2583-973X (Online) Website: www.theacademic.in Page | 195 Contesting the Platform: Worker Resistance in India’s Food Delivery Abhinav Kumar Research Scholar, Jawaharlal Nehru University, New Delhi, India ARTICLE DETAILS ABSTRACT Research Paper Accepted: 23-05-2025 Published: 10-06-2025 India’s rising food delivery sector, dominated by platforms like Zomato, Swiggy, Eatclub and Eatsure, has become a site of intense labour struggle in recent years. From the “No AC” campaign by Hyderabad cab drivers in 2025 (where drivers kept car air-conditioning off to protest unsustainably low fares), to the April The Academic Volume 3 | Issue 5 | May 2025 Abhinav Kumar Page | 197 2023 mass strike of Blinkit grocery deliverers against a drastic pay revision, India’s platform gig workers are asserting their rights in diverse ways.
